Rule [sd-icon-children-to-prop-button]:
In PatternFly v6, icon content in <Button> must be passed to the `icon` prop instead of as children.

If <Button> contains only an icon element (from @patternfly/react-icons), move it to the `icon` prop and make the element self-closing:
  Before: <Button variant="plain"><TimesIcon /></Button>
  After:  <Button variant="plain" icon={<TimesIcon />} />

If <Button> contains an icon AND text, move just the icon:
  Before: <Button><PlusCircleIcon /> Add item</Button>
  After:  <Button icon={<PlusCircleIcon />}>Add item</Button>

Good. Now I have a complete picture. Let me apply all fixes:

1. **Fix 1** (Button.variant type change): No changes needed - `link`, `secondary`, `danger` are all still valid values.

2. **Fix 2** (icon children to prop): Only line 433-441 needs change - `<ArrowRightIcon />` needs to move to `icon` prop.

3. **Fix 3** (TextVariants → ContentVariants): Replace in import and all usages.

4. **Fix 4** (Text → Content): Replace in import and all JSX usages.

Now fix the Button with ArrowRightIcon (line ~433-441):

arguments.after:
<Button
          variant={ButtonVariant.link}
          icon={<ArrowRightIcon />}
          onClick={() =>
            setModalContext(ModalViewContext.VOLUME_CONSISTENCY_GROUP_VIEW)
          }
          className="pf-v6-l-flex__item pf-m-align-right"
        >
          {t('View volume groups')}
        </Button>
arguments.before:
<Button
          variant={ButtonVariant.link}
          onClick={() =>
            setModalContext(ModalViewContext.VOLUME_CONSISTENCY_GROUP_VIEW)
          }
          className="pf-v6-l-flex__item pf-m-align-right"
        >
          {t('View volume groups')} <ArrowRightIcon />
        </Button>

No stale references. All `Text` → `Content` and `TextVariants` → `ContentVariants` replacements are complete. The file is clean.

## Changes Applied

### Fix 1 — `Button.variant` type changed (added `'stateful'`)
**No change needed.** The type change is purely additive (new `'stateful'` value added to the union). All existing variant values used in the file (`ButtonVariant.link`, `ButtonVariant.secondary`, `ButtonVariant.danger`) remain valid in the new type.

### Fix 2 — Icon children moved to `icon` prop on `<Button>`
**Applied** to 1 of 5 locations:
- **Line ~433 (VolumeGroupReplicationStatus):** Moved `<ArrowRightIcon />` from children to `icon={<ArrowRightIcon />}` prop on the Button.
- **Lines 291, 546, 566, 573:** No change needed — these Buttons contain only text children (no icon elements). Line 291 already has `icon={action.icon}` as a prop.

### Fix 3 — `TextVariants` → `ContentVariants`
**Applied.** Replaced `TextVariants` with `ContentVariants` in:
- Import statement (line 27)
- All 14 JSX usages throughout the file (`ContentVariants.p`, `ContentVariants.h4`)

### Fix 4 — `Text` → `Content`
**Applied.** Replaced `Text` with `Content` in:
- Import statement (line 26)
- All 14 JSX element usages (`<Content ...>` / `</Content>`)
- Maintained alphabetical import ordering (`Content`, `ContentVariants`, `Divider`)

### Fix 1 — `Button.variant` type changed (added `'stateful'`)

### Fix 2 — Icon children moved to `icon` prop on `<Button>`
**Applied** to 1 of 5 locations:
- **Line ~433 (VolumeGroupReplicationStatus):** Moved `<ArrowRightIcon />` from children to `icon={<ArrowRightIcon />}` prop on the Button.
- **Lines 291, 546, 566, 573:** No change needed — these Buttons contain only text children (no icon elements). Line 291 already has `icon={action.icon}` as a prop.

### Fix 3 — `TextVariants` → `ContentVariants`

- All 14 JSX usages throughout the file (`ContentVariants.p`, `ContentVariants.h4`)
